## Week in Review: 2026-06-15 to 2026-06-21

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 38.7.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

- **One Nation**: Avg interest 38.7 (-30.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.23)
